name: feedcontext-skill
description: Source repository and installable artifact for the FeedContext Skill

scripts.build: pnpm run build:schema && pnpm run build:helper && git diff --exit-code -- skills/feedcontext/schemas/structured-synthesis.schema.json skills/feedcontext/schemas/show-script.schema.json skills/feedcontext/scripts/helper.mjs
scripts.build:helper: bun build src/feedcontext.ts --format esm --packages bundle --target node --minify --outfile skills/feedcontext/scripts/helper.mjs
scripts.build:schema: mkdir -p skills/feedcontext/schemas && cp src/structured-synthesis.schema.json skills/feedcontext/schemas/structured-synthesis.schema.json && cp src/show-script.schema.json skills/feedcontext/schemas/show-script.schema.json
